creator: trueos@norwegianrockcat.com
text:
(In reply to lightside from comment #32)

Thank you for doing creating the patch. I guess I should have thought of doing that instead of trying to figure out what was going wrong with meson.

Regardless, yes, this fixes the problem! All the names that are shown correctly in Pulse applications (i.e., they show the same names that /dev/sndstat does). And, yes, the microphone works too.

So, yes, this patch fixes my issue. Thank you for the quick response. Can we get that committed?
